candidates.why: Explicit D&A component row above the financial section, but it is not labelled as related to COGS/cost of sales and appears to be part of the broader operating D&A disclosure rather than a COGS-specific line.

variables.notes: The selected COGS bucket is only 'Raw materials and consumables'. Because the statement does not allocate D&A between COGS and SG&A, adding any visible D&A row to COGS_DA would be speculative and risks misclassification/double counting. Conservative output is empty, with manual review due to allocation ambiguity.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Other external expenses' and 'Employee benefits expenses'. The income statement presents D&A separately from those rows, so it is not embedded in the selected XSGA components; however, the visible D&A rows are not identified as SG&A-specific and may cover broader operating assets, including lease/right-of-use depreciation. Since no dedicated R&D row is selected and no SG&A-specific D&A labelling is provided, assigning any of these rows to XSGA_DA would be uncertain.
